ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Good response, but could be more natural in tone and less formal to match the persona of a suspicious guardian.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>Short note: Lacks context relevance entirely; does not address any specifics from the scenario or player input, and fails to maintain persona consistency as a strict guardian.
